sections.title: Lockout Tagout Procedure and Verification Permit
sections.html:
WORK AUTHORIZATION PERMIT

Permit Number: [DATE]-[MISH15]-[SEQ]

Pre-work Conditions Checklist:

☐ All affected employees notified

☐ Equipment de-energized and isolated

sections.title: Lockout Tagout Procedure and Verification Permit (continued 2)
sections.html:
☐ All energy sources locked out/tagged out

☐ Stored energy relieved/restrained

☐ Verification of zero energy state performed

☐ Area secured and warning signs posted

☐ Required PPE available and inspected

sections.title: Lockout Tagout Procedure and Verification Permit (continued 3)
sections.html:
☐ Emergency procedures reviewed

Work Authorization:

Work Description

Location

Start Time

End Time

Authorized By

Required Controls:

☐ Lockout devices in place

sections.title: Lockout Tagout Procedure and Verification Permit (continued 4)
sections.html:
☐ Tagout devices in place

☐ Energy isolation devices verified

☐ Communication plan established

☐ Standby personnel assigned (if required)

Permit Closure:

sections.title: Lockout Tagout Procedure and Verification Permit (continued 5)
sections.html:
☐ Work completed

☐ Area restored

Permit closed by: _________________________

Date/Time: _________________________
